title: galal #1556
definition:
1) to roll, roll away, roll down, roll together
    1a) (Qal) to roll
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to roll up
        1b2) to flow down
    1c) (Pilpel) to roll
    1d) (Poal) to be rolled
    1e) (Hithpoel) to roll oneself
    1f) (Hithpalpel) to roll oneself
    1g) (Hiphil) to roll away
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to roll, roll away, roll down, roll together
    1a) (Qal) to roll
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to roll up
        1b2) to flow down
    1c) (Pilpel) to roll
    1d) (Poal) to be rolled
    1e) (Hithpoel) to roll oneself
    1f) (Hithpalpel) to roll oneself
    1g) (Hiphil) to roll away

    NASB:  to roll, roll away
